message:
feat(fp-io): SqlColumnSchema::autoincrement field for autoincrement metadata (br-bkl2 / fd90.37)

Add autoincrement: bool to SqlColumnSchema completing
SQLAlchemy.Inspector.get_columns() parity. The dict shape includes
'autoincrement' alongside name/type/nullable/default/primary_key/
comment.

SQLite detection (in the rusqlite table_schema override): a column
qualifies as autoincrement when its declared_type is INTEGER
(case-insensitive) AND PRAGMA table_info reports pk == 1 — that's
SQLite's rowid-alias rule for INTEGER PRIMARY KEY. The optional
AUTOINCREMENT keyword affects whether IDs are reused after delete
but does not change the property pandas surfaces.

Other backends override their table_schema directly: PG
SERIAL/BIGSERIAL/IDENTITY columns true; MySQL AUTO_INCREMENT
modifier true; otherwise false.

9 existing SqlColumnSchema struct literal sites bulk-updated with
autoincrement: false for backwards compat.

6 new tests cover: INTEGER PRIMARY KEY auto-detected, INTEGER
PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT auto-detected, TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT
autoincrement, non-PK INTEGER NOT autoincrement, composite PK with
INTEGER first column documents the heuristic boundary case (matches
SQLAlchemy's PRAGMA-based detection), PG-like backend stub
returning explicit autoincrement true/false per column.

391 fp-io tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean across fp-io +
umbrella; ubs Critical=0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
